items.title: Jamie Dimon Warns Of Economic Weakening, Negative Consumer Sentiment
items.author: Adam Eckert
items.description: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon warns of a weakening economy and negative consumer sentiment, citing uncertainty caused by tariffs. He believes the average American is unlikely to change their behavior due to tariffs.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The CEO of JPMorgan Chase, Jamie Dimon, warned of a weakening economy and negative consumer sentiment, suggesting a cautious outlook for the company.

items.title: Is the Fidelity High Dividend ETF the Smartest Investment You Can Make Today?
items.author: The Motley Fool
items.description: The article discusses the benefits of investing in dividend-paying stocks during market pullbacks, highlighting the Fidelity High Dividend ETF as a potential option. It provides performance comparisons and details on the ETF's holdings and fees.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article presents the Fidelity High Dividend ETF as a favorable investment option during market pullbacks, highlighting its strong performance, diversified portfolio, and low expense ratio.
